delegations.task_goal: Disable BOSS task commands and preserve truthful identity/manual-browser and historical failure diagnostics.

delegations.summary: Implementation and two review fixes were read back and integrated at product head f23cf29f4e56d1432277ead5d88b1b57c1e037e9.

delegations.task_goal: Review fail-closed BOSS entrypoints, XHS non-regression and historical diagnostics provenance.
delegations.validation_expectation: typecheck, smoke, diff check and semantic review.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller required both P2 findings fixed before final ALLOW.
delegations.summary: Final review ALLOW confirmed zero-fetch for both task IDs, runtime_admission_disabled, actual Core owner time, separate evidence freshness and unchanged XHS/shared projection.

integration_evidence.summary: Both BOSS task IDs fail before fetch with the exact deferred reason.
Current BOSS success/fixture readiness is removed; identity/manual browser and historical failure owner time/provenance/class remain.
Non-BOSS projection returns the original task and shared runtime health remains unchanged.
